overall.description: A train journey at night through a mountainous region, entering and traversing a long concrete tunnel before emerging into a rocky pass. The footage appears to be from a train simulator game with artificial lighting from the train illuminating the tracks and tunnel walls.

events.description: passing under railway signal gantry with green lights
crossing small railway bridge over dry terrain

agents.ego_description: operating train along mountain railway track at night, approaching tunnel

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the railway cutting
steep rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the railway cutting
metal railway tracks with wooden sleepers and gravel ballast
metal overhead signal structure spanning the tracks with green lights
short railway bridge with concrete sides crossing a small depression
concrete tunnel entrance with arched top and circular lining pattern

segments.scene_description: The train travels through a narrow mountain cutting at night, with rocky cliffs on both sides. The camera passes under a signal gantry and crosses a small bridge while approaching the illuminated tunnel entrance in the distance.

events.description: entering the concrete tunnel portal, transitioning from outdoor to enclosed space
passing periodic wall-mounted lights illuminating the tunnel interior

agents.ego_description: traveling at steady speed through the long concrete tunnel

entered.detail: curved concrete tunnel walls with horizontal cable conduits and weathered texture
arched concrete ceiling of the tunnel creating a tube-like enclosure
periodic electric lights mounted on the tunnel walls providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The train enters the long concrete tunnel, leaving the outdoor mountain cutting behind. The artificial train headlights illuminate the curved concrete walls and ceiling as the train passes periodic wall-mounted lights, traveling through the enclosed tube.

events.description: exiting the tunnel portal back into open mountain terrain
camera pans left to reveal the steep rocky cliff face alongside the track

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and continuing through the mountain pass with slight leftward view

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with rough texture visible close to the track
rocky hillside forming the right boundary of the cutting
metal safety railings along the edge of the railway embankment
concrete tunnel exit portal with circular lining pattern, passed and left behind
dark night sky with visible stars above the mountain cutting

segments.scene_description: The train exits the tunnel into the open mountain pass, with metal guardrails now visible along the track edges. The camera pans left to show the steep rocky cliff face close to the train as it continues through the dark mountain terrain under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a narrow mountain cutting through a concrete tunnel and back into an open rocky pass at night. It begins by gliding under a signal gantry and across a small bridge, flanked by steep cliffs as it approaches a distant, illuminated tunnel entrance. As the train enters the tunnel, the outdoor landscape vanishes, replaced by a curved concrete tube where artificial headlights and periodic wall-mounted lamps cast a glow on the enclosed walls. The scene then opens as the train emerges from the tunnel into the night air, revealing metal guardrails along the track edges. Finally, the camera pans left to capture the towering rocky cliff face pressing close to the train as it continues its journey through the dark mountain terrain.
